mapper.insert: insert into account ( user_id, account_number, balance ) values ( #{userid}, #{accountNumber}, 0 )
mapper.select: select a.id, a.user_id as userid, a.account_number as accountNumber, m.username as ownerName, a.balance from account a join member m on a.user_id = m.userid where a.user_id = #{userid}
select a.id, a.user_id as userid, a.account_number as accountNumber, m.username as ownerName, a.balance from account a join member m on a.user_id = m.userid where a.user_id = #{userid} for update
